title: EQ - Custom EQ, change the value on sliders, Save EQ
scenario: Custom EQ preset fails to save after adjusting slider values and tapping Save EQ in Device Settings
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
Ensure a supported Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
Adjust one or more slider values (e.g., Bass, Mid, Treble) to desired levels.
Tap the 'Save EQ' button to save the custom preset.
expected: The custom EQ preset is saved successfully and appears in the list of available EQ presets.
